sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions after DOWN
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Find player and green block rows
player_rows = [r for r, line in enumerate(ascii_lines) if 'M' in line[:20] and r < 50]
green_rows = [r for r, line in enumerate(ascii_lines) if 'N' in line and r < 50]

print(f"Player rows: {player_rows}")
print(f"Green block rows: {green_rows}")

# Find exact player position
for r in range(10, 30):
    if 'M' in ascii_lines[r][:20]:
        print(f"  Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][8:28]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
